creator: freebsd@contenidosonline.com.ar
text:
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#       /usr/ports/net/py-cloudfiles
#       /usr/ports/net/py-cloudfiles/pkg-descr
#       /usr/ports/net/py-cloudfiles/Makefile
#       /usr/ports/net/py-cloudfiles/pkg-plist
#       /usr/ports/net/py-cloudfiles/distinfo
#
echo c - /usr/ports/net/py-cloudfiles
mkdir -p /usr/ports/net/py-cloudfiles > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - /usr/ports/net/py-cloudfiles/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/net/py-cloudfiles/pkg-descr << '63ce08b82ee0767a5a3c043b006ee2c4'
XPython language bindings for Cloud Files API
X
XWWW:   http://github.com/rackspace/python-cloudfiles/tree
63ce08b82ee0767a5a3c043b006ee2c4
echo x - /usr/ports/net/py-cloudfiles/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/net/py-cloudfiles/Makefile << 'dc0aa52ef60a39abaa18c280498fbe72'
X# New ports collection makefile for:   py-cloudfiles
X# Date created:                2009-10-24
X# Whom:                        Roberto Pereyra <freebsd@contenidosonline.com.ar>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=      py-cloudfiles
XPORTVERSION=   1.5.1
X#PORTREVISION= 0
X#PORTEPOCH=    0
XCATEGORIES=    net
XMASTER_SITES=  http://www.contenidosonline.com.ar/freebsd/ports/
X#MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=
X#PKGNAMEPREFIX=
X#PKGNAMESUFFIX=
X#DISTNAME=
X#EXTRACT_SUFX=
X#DISTFILES=
X#DIST_SUBDIR=  ${PORTNAME}
X#EXTRACT_ONLY=
X
XMAINTAINER=    freebsd@contenidosonline.com.ar
XCOMMENT=       Python language bindings for Cloud Files API
X
XUSE_PYTHON=    2.4+
XUSE_PYDISTUTILS=       yes
XPYDISTUTILS_NOEGGINFO= yes
X
X.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
X.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
dc0aa52ef60a39abaa18c280498fbe72
echo x - /usr/ports/net/py-cloudfiles/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/net/py-cloudfiles/pkg-plist << 'a72e02e31863979b21387edfbf3c7e46'
X@comment $FreeBSD$
X%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/cloudfiles/__init__.py

X%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/cloudfiles/connection.py

X%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/cloudfiles/container.py
X%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/cloudfiles/errors.py
X%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/cloudfiles/fjson.py
X%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/cloudfiles/storage_object.py
X%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/cloudfiles/utils.py
X%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/cloudfiles/__init__.pyc

X%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/cloudfiles/consts.pyc

X%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/cloudfiles/errors.pyc
X%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/cloudfiles/fjson.pyc
X%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/cloudfiles/storage_object.pyc
X%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/cloudfiles/utils.pyc
X%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/cloudfiles/__init__.pyo

X%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/cloudfiles/consts.pyo

X%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/cloudfiles/fjson.pyo
X%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/cloudfiles/storage_object.pyo

X@dirrm %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/cloudfiles
a72e02e31863979b21387edfbf3c7e46
echo x - /usr/ports/net/py-cloudfiles/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/net/py-cloudfiles/distinfo << 'aee37b92a31095cbcc5da9569ca03f9f'
XMD5 (py-cloudfiles-1.5.1.tar.gz) = 0158786a4ead32fb32071b2839f56a19

exit
